queries: E2E pipeline Using Apache Kafka for Real-Time Data Streaming recent authoritative sources
action.query: E2E pipeline Using Apache Kafka for Real-Time Data Streaming recent authoritative sources

annotations.title: Sprenger, Stefan: Streaming Data Pipelines with Apache Kafka | idegen | bookline
Real-Time Data Pipeline with Apache Kafka, Spark, and Hive | iba
End-to-End Architecture for Real-Time IoT Analytics and Predictive Maintenance Using Stream Processing and ML Pipelines - PMC
MultiChain Blockchain Data Provenance for Deterministic Stream Processing with Kafka Streams: A Weather Data Case Study
Analysis of Design Patterns and Benchmark Practices in Apache Kafka Event-Streaming Systems
AffectStream: Kafka-based real-time affect monitoring system using wearable sensors - ScienceDirect
ESTemd: A Distributed Processing Framework for Environmental Monitoring based on Apache Kafka Streaming Engine
CityPulse: Real-Time Traffic Data Analytics and Congestion Prediction

content.text:
Here are several authoritative and recent resources on building end-to-end (E2E) data pipelines using Apache Kafka for real-time data streaming:

1. **"Streaming Data Pipelines with Apache Kafka" by Stefan Sprenger (2026)**  
   This book provides a comprehensive guide to constructing real-time data pipelines using Apache Kafka. It covers topics such as change data capture, troubleshooting, and performance tuning, offering practical insights for building robust streaming data infrastructures. ([bookline.hu](https://bookline.hu/product/home.action?_v=Sprenger_Stefan_Streaming_Data_Pipelin&id=6979815&type=200&utm_source=openai))

2. **"Real-Time Data Pipeline with Apache Kafka, Spark, and Hive" by Boakye I. Ababio (2024)**  
   This article outlines a scalable, Docker-based architecture for handling data streams from Reddit, processing them with Apache Kafka and Spark, and storing the results in Apache Hive for analytical querying. It demonstrates the integration of Kafka with Spark and Hive in a real-time data pipeline. ([iababio.dev](https://www.iababio.dev/blog/stream-kafka-spark-reddit?utm_source=openai))

3. **"End-to-End Architecture for Real-Time IoT Analytics and Predictive Maintenance Using Stream Processing and ML Pipelines" (2024)**  
   This research paper discusses a real-time data pipeline designed for IoT analytics and predictive maintenance, utilizing Apache Kafka for data ingestion and stream processing. It highlights the role of Kafka in managing real-time data feeds and integrating with machine learning pipelines. ([pmc.ncbi.nlm.nih.gov](https://pmc.ncbi.nlm.nih.gov/articles/PMC12074242/?utm_source=openai))

4. **"MultiChain Blockchain Data Provenance for Deterministic Stream Processing with Kafka Streams: A Weather Data Case Study" (2026)**  
   This study introduces a blockchain-backed provenance architecture for streaming platforms like Kafka Streams, ensuring auditability and reproducibility in real-time data pipelines. It presents a case study using real-time weather data to demonstrate the approach. ([arxiv.org](https://arxiv.org/abs/2601.18011?utm_source=openai))

5. **"Analysis of Design Patterns and Benchmark Practices in Apache Kafka Event-Streaming Systems" (2025)**  
   This paper presents a structured synthesis of various Kafka design patterns and benchmarking methodologies, offering practical guidance for architects and researchers in designing high-performance and fault-tolerant Kafka-based event streaming systems. ([arxiv.org](https://arxiv.org/abs/2512.16146?utm_source=openai))

6. **"AffectStream: Kafka-based Real-Time Affect Monitoring System Using Wearable Sensors" (2024)**  
   This article describes AffectStream, a Kafka-based cloud service supporting an end-to-end pipeline for real-time affect analysis, from sensor data collection to modeling and management. It illustrates the application of Kafka in real-time data processing for wearable sensor data. ([sciencedirect.com](https://www.sciencedirect.com/science/article/pii/S2352711025002912?utm_source=openai))

7. **"ESTemd: A Distributed Processing Framework for Environmental Monitoring Based on Apache Kafka Streaming Engine" (2021)**  
   This paper proposes a distributed framework for environmental monitoring using Apache Kafka for real-time analytics. It addresses challenges related to data heterogeneity and real-time processing of large environmental datasets through a unified data pipeline. ([arxiv.org](https://arxiv.org/abs/2104.01082?utm_source=openai))

8. **"CityPulse: Real-Time Traffic Data Analytics and Congestion Prediction" (2025)**  
   This proof-of-concept big data pipeline enables real-time urban mobility analytics using scalable, containerized components, including Apache Kafka for data ingestion and processing. It demonstrates the use of Kafka in real-time traffic data analytics and congestion prediction. ([arxiv.org](https://arxiv.org/abs/2506.01971?utm_source=openai))

These resources provide a solid foundation for understanding and implementing end-to-end data pipelines with Apache Kafka for real-time data streaming.
